class.name: SwingTwistIK3D
class.brief_description: Whole-body swing-twist inverse kinematics solver with per-joint controls.
class.description: A concrete [IterateIK3D] solver that poses a whole [Skeleton3D] to reach its targets. It runs over all chains at once: each bone is rotated by a multi-limb best fit toward its downstream targets (swing), then twisted about the resulting axis. Per-joint [Vector3] priorities weight position, swing, and twist; [member free_root] lets the pins drag the body; and the per-joint [code]stiffness[/code], [code]engage[/code], [code]isolation[/code] and [code]relax[/code] controls shape how the chain settles. A pole is set up as a low-position, zero-orientation weight on a mid joint, so it needs no dedicated control.

method.name: get_joint_engage
method.description: Returns the joint's engage value: the solve progress (0 to 1) at which it starts moving. 0 means it moves from the first iteration.

method.name: get_joint_isolation
method.description: Returns the joint's isolation (0 to 1): how strongly its pin blocks descendant pins from pulling on bones above it. 0 lets the pull through.

method.name: get_joint_priorities
method.description: Returns the joint's [Vector3] priorities: x weights the pull toward the target point, y weights aiming the forward axis (swing), z weights matching the roll (twist).

method.name: get_joint_relax
method.description: Returns the joint's relax value (0 to 1): the strength of the restoring pull toward its rest pose.

method.name: get_joint_stiffness
method.description: Returns the joint's stiffness (0 to 1): how much it resists rotating. 0 is free, 1 is rigid.

method.name: has_pin
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param bone] has a pin.

method.name: is_bone_locked
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param bone] is locked to its forward-kinematics pose.

method.name: set_bone_locked
method.description: Locks or unlocks [param bone]. A locked bone keeps its forward-kinematics pose and the solver routes around it.

method.name: set_joint_engage
method.description: Sets the joint's engage value: the solve progress (0 to 1) at which it starts moving. 0 means it moves from the first iteration.

method.name: set_joint_isolation
method.description: Sets the joint's isolation (0 to 1): how strongly its pin blocks descendant pins from pulling on bones above it. 0 lets the pull through.

method.name: set_joint_priorities
method.description: Sets the joint's priorities: [param position] weights the pull toward the target point, [param swing] weights aiming the forward axis, [param twist] weights matching the roll.

method.name: set_joint_relax
method.description: Sets the joint's relax value (0 to 1): the strength of the restoring pull toward its rest pose. It biases the slack the targets leave free, so reach is kept; at 1 the bone sits at rest.

method.name: set_joint_stiffness
method.description: Sets the joint's stiffness (0 to 1): how much it resists rotating. 0 is free, 1 is rigid.

method.name: set_pin
method.description: Pins [param bone] to [param target]'s transform; the solver drags the bone to it. One pin per bone.
